ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the dataset */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider of the dataset */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license of the dataset */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the dataset */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset this distribution belongs to */,
  "distribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the distribution */,
  "data_access_mode" TEXT /* Access mode for the data (open, shared, closed) */,
  "byte_size" INTEGER /* Size of the distribution in bytes */,
  "available_until" TEXT /* Date until which the distribution will be available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the distribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the distribution was last updated */,
  "access_url" TEXT /* URL to access the distribution */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the distribution for data integrity */,
  "checksum_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the checksum */,
  "embargo_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution will be available publicly (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributions_data_access_mode FOREIGN KEY ("data_access_mode") REFERENCES data_access_policies ("access_mode")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  "provider_website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within their institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset/distribution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the dataset/distribution (e.g., API, web interface, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the readme file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access policy */,
  "access_mode" TEXT /* Access mode (open, shared, closed) */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the access policy */,
  "policy_url" TEXT /* URL of the policy document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the distribution */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_versions_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level or hierarchy of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., keyword, category, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution this tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., keyword, category, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_tags_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_comments_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)
